description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a light wood finish and a minimalist design. The front features two large sliding doors, each equipped with a vertical recessed metal handle for easy access. The cabinet stands on a slim, black metal base that slightly elevates it off the ground, giving it a modern and airy appearance. The sides and top are plain, with the back panel appearing to be a solid, lighter-colored surface, likely made of a different material for structural support. The overall construction suggests a sturdy build, suitable for storing documents or office supplies. The design is functional and contemporary, making it ideal for urban office or administrative environments.
description: A tall, light wood filing cabinet with sliding doors and recessed metal handles, elevated on a slim black base. Its modern, minimalist design is suitable for office or administrative use.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing a plain, vertical wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying two large sliding doors with vertical recessed handles and the slim black base.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet, identical to the left, with a plain wood panel and no features.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet, featuring a solid, light-colored panel with no handles or openings.
